---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem does this solve? Or what improvement does it bring?

## Proposed solution

How should it work? Include UI mockups, key bindings, or CLI flags if relevant.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought of and why this one is better.

## Additional context

Any related issues, links, or screenshots.
